(I am a nerd, so when I hear Mythos, I think Cthulhu.)

David Haber on the idea behind "Firm > Fund":

"Most people are running funds. It's how do I generate the most carry with the fewest people in the shortest amount of time possible."

"A firm is two things. It's delivering exceptional returns, which is a prerequisite."

CodePilot 0.40.0 版本应该是第一个全面拥抱 CLI 浪潮的 Agent 的产品！

内置了很多AI 友好的 CLI 工具，有老牌的 FFmpeg，也有新增的 Strip 和网易云音乐。

同时，AI 能够帮你完成 CLI 工具的安装和入库，以及它清楚地知道应该如何使用这些工具。 https://t.co/izq6JaDyjh
